data.title: The total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$126.152 billion, and the cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.369 billion.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (May 30, Eastern Time) the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$616 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net outflow of US$431 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$48.569 billion.
The second largest was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a net outflow of US$120 million in a single day. Currently, ARKB's total net inflow has reached US$2.444 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$126.152 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) reached 6.07%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$44.369 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of $70.2402 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 10 consecutive days.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (May 30, US Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 70.2402 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of 70.2402 million US dollars. Currently, the total net inflow of ETHA has reached 4.606 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 9.445 billion US dollars, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.04%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 3.046 billion US dollars.

data.title: Revolving Games Completes New Round of Funding Led by Pantera Capital
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 video game publisher Revolving Games announced the completion of a new round of financing led by Pantera Capital to expand its game distribution ecosystem based on RCADE Network. The specific amount was not disclosed. The company plans to accelerate the release of the "War of Nova", "Hatchlings" series and the new work "Skyborne: Phoenix Flight", which will be launched in a PC-only beta in the third quarter of 2025.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow in the U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $70.2 million into the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF yesterday. This substantial investment highlights growing interest in Ethereum-based financial products among investors.

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-gives-musk-a-send-off/

data.title: Security Breach Highlights Risks of Mnemonic Phrase Exposure
data.description:
According to Foresight News, SlowMist founder Yu Jian has reported a security breach involving the exposure of mnemonic phrases. A user had four mnemonic phrases leaked, leading to the theft of funds from four corresponding wallet addresses. The hacker converted the stolen assets into ETH and laundered them through FixedFloat.

Yu Jian emphasized the risks associated with prolonged online exposure and widespread distribution of mnemonic phrases or private keys. He warned that the longer these are used online and shared among multiple users, the higher the likelihood of leakage, making it increasingly difficult to trace the source of the breach.

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: The longer the mnemonics/private keys are used online and the more people share them, the easier it is to leak and the harder it is to troubleshoot.
data.description: Yu Xian, the founder of SlowMist, said that four sets of mnemonics of a certain user were leaked, and the funds in the four corresponding wallet addresses were stolen. From the perspective of the on-chain operation, after receiving the funds, the hacker exchanged them all for ETH and then washed them away through FixedFloat. The longer the mnemonics/private keys are used online and the more people they are distributed to, the more likely they are to be leaked, and the more difficult it is to investigate the cause of the leak.

data.title: A whale is suspected of clearing 1,290 ETH and making a profit of $950,000
data.description: On-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that the whale who built an ETH position at $1,768 on April 25th seemed to have liquidated 1,290 ETH (about $3.23 million) half an hour ago, and would have made a profit of $950,000 if sold.

data.title: Stocks and Crypto Tick Downward As Trump Accuses China of Violating Trade Agreement
data.description:
Stocks and crypto lost a little bit of ground on Friday as President Donald Trump accused China of violating a recent trade agreement. Trump says on Truth Social that he had previously decided to make a deal with China because his tariffs were plunging the Asian giant into “grave economic danger.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/30/stocks-and-crypto-tick-downward-as-trump-accuses-china-of-violating-trade-agreement/

data.title: A whale's 25x leveraged long ETH position increased to $75.27 million, with a floating loss of $1.4 million
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that a whale deposited 1.7 million USDC (a total of 4.3 million US dollars) into HyperLiquid, increasing its ETH long position with 25 times leverage. Currently, the nominal value of the ETH position has reached 75.27 million US dollars, with a floating loss of 1.4 million US dollars.

data.title: Meta shareholders voted down proposal to add Bitcoin to reserves
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: At the annual general meeting of shareholders on May 30, Meta Platforms shareholders rejected a proposal to add Bitcoin (BTC) to its $72 billion cash reserves. The vote ended with 4.98 billion shares against and 3.92 million shares in favor. (CryptoSlate)

data.description: Trader T monitoring shows that the U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of US$614.02 million yesterday, the largest single-day outflow since February 26.

data.title: A whale missed out on a $10 million profit and lost $2.47 million by short selling BTC. He then spent 43.36 million USDT to buy ETH and is currently losing $1.66 million.
data.description: According to the on-chain analyst Ember Monitoring, a whale bought BTC at the bottom of $85,751 at the end of March. If it got it, it was expected to make a profit of more than $10 million. However, in mid-April, the whale sold it at $84,426. A few days later, BTC quickly rose to $110,000. After selling the spot, the whale borrowed 124 WBTC and sold it short at $84,558. The 124 WBTC sold short were bought back at $104,444 10 hours ago, with a loss of $2.47 million. After the repayment, the whale bought 16,638 ETH with 43.36 million USDT, with an average purchase price of $2,606. The current ETH price is about $100 lower than its purchase price, with a floating loss of $1.66 million.

data.title: Meta Platforms Shareholders Reject Bitcoin Financial Assessment Proposal
data.description: According to Foresight News, Phoenix reports that Meta Platforms shareholders have voted against a proposal for a financial assessment of Bitcoin. The decision reflects the company's stance on cryptocurrency evaluations and its approach to digital asset management. Shareholders expressed concerns over the implications of such an assessment on Meta's financial strategy and future investments. The rejection highlights ongoing debates within the corporate sector regarding the integration of cryptocurrencies into traditional financial systems.
